name: scissor
description: A personal Cursor-like terminal AI coding agent

scripts.test: node --import tsx scripts/test-session.mts && node --import tsx scripts/test-selfupdate.mts && node --import tsx scripts/test-retrieve.mts && node --import tsx scripts/test-verify-loop.mts && node --import tsx scripts/test-edit-engine.mts && node --import tsx scripts/test-compaction.mts && node --import tsx scripts/test-remember.mts && node --import tsx scripts/test-eval.mts && node --import tsx scripts/test-bench.mts && node --import tsx scripts/test-mcp.mts && node --import tsx scripts/test-tdd.mts && node --import tsx scripts/test-router.mts && node --import tsx scripts/test-scratchpad.mts && node --import tsx scripts/test-subagent.mts && node --import tsx scripts/test-trace.mts && node --import tsx scripts/test-guardrails.mts && node --import tsx scripts/test-parallel.mts && node --import tsx scripts/test-trace-report.mts && node --import tsx scripts/test-diagnostics.mts && node --import tsx scripts/test-eval-gen.mts && node --import tsx scripts/test-askuser.mts && node --import tsx scripts/test-intent.mts && node --import tsx scripts/test-clarify.mts
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm test && npm run eval -- --strict
